spec.name: The Entrance
spec.description: You are in a very dark room. You notice that some faces are staring at you from inside the walls. In the middle of the room there is a small altar. To the north there is a small round door.

north.description: A beam of red light seeps through a hole in the door.

extra_descs.description: This altar is very special. Faces appear to be smiling from it. There is a triangle engraved in the top of it.
The triangle is filled with small symbols. They seem to be a language you have never seen before.
